task_description: Build a full, production-ready Institute ERP system from scratch with role-based access for Admin, Trainer, Counsellor, and Student. Monorepo with Node.js/Express/TypeScript backend + React/Vite/TypeScript frontend. Features: JWT auth, RBAC, hybrid attendance (QR + online), evaluation system, mock interviews, fee management, reporting with PDF/Excel export, Docker containerization.

verification.review: v1 review completed - 9 issues identified and fixed (JWT secret hardcoding, QR timing attack, token revocation, trainer ownership, cascading deletes, counsellor fee ownership, pagination cap, upload auth, test DB isolation)
verification.summary: All verification passes after review fixes. Backend: tsc compiles cleanly, 48 integration tests pass (auth, admin CRUD, trainer, attendance with QR token validation). Frontend: vite build succeeds (838 modules), 6 component tests pass. Docker: multi-stage image builds successfully. Security review issues addressed.
